===How I Became a Pokémon Card===
In the [[How I Became a Pokémon Card]] chapter ''[[PW17|The Injured Persian]]'', a young boy playing in the forest discovers an injured wild Persian, implied to have been hurt while escaping from a group of Pokémon poachers called the Pokémon Collection Group. Despite being scratched by the Persian multiple times, the boy attempts to treat it, bringing it to a [[Pokémon Center]]. However, once the boy leaves, the doctor working at the Pokémon Center calls the Pokémon Collection Group, who come to take the Persian away in a large truck. Despite never being caught by him, the Persian responds to the boy’s commands, using its moves to escape. A flash-forward reveals the young boy to be Giovanni, now an adult and preparing for a decisive battle with Persian by his side.

{{-}}
